subject: Explore project context
description: Check current files, docs, and git history in the github.io repo

subject: Offer visual companion
description: Offer browser-based visual companion for mockups and layout questions

subject: Ask clarifying questions
description: Ask one-at-a-time questions to understand purpose, constraints, and success criteria

subject: Propose 2-3 approaches
description: Present approaches with trade-offs and recommendation

subject: Present design and get approval
description: Present design in sections and get user approval

subject: Spec self-review and user review gate
description: Review spec for placeholders, contradictions, ambiguity; get user approval

subject: Transition to implementation plan
description: Invoke writing-plans skill to create implementation plan
